---
title: "Flights Dashboard"
format: dashboard
server: shiny
loading: lazy
envvars: 
    PYTHONUTF8: "1"
    PYTHONIOENCODING: "utf-8"
    LANG: "en_US.UTF-8"
# theme: slate
---


```{python}
# IMPORT LIBRARIES
import polars as pl
import pygwalker as pyg
import plotly.express as px
from pmdarima import auto_arima
import psycopg2
import pandas as pd
from statsmodels.tsa.stattools import adfuller
from statsmodels.graphics.tsaplots import plot_acf, plot_pacf
from statsmodels.tsa.statespace.sarimax import SARIMAX
from plotly.subplots import make_subplots
from src.db_connect import ps_connect


from keplergl import KeplerGl
from shinywidgets import render_widget, render_plotly
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from datetime import datetime
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from ipyleaflet import Map, Polyline, CircleMarker, Marker
from shiny import render, reactive, ui
# from shiny.express import render, ui,  input

from datetime import date
import base64
import calendar
from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta
from IPython.display import HTML
import json

# from sklearn.metrics import mean_absolute_error, mean_squared_error
```
```{python}
# CONNECT TO DATABASE AND LOAD DATA
conn = ps_connect()
cursor = conn.cursor()
```
```{python}
# AIRPORT'S LOCATIONS
query = """SELECT 
        name, latitude_deg, longitude_deg, iso_country, icao_code, iata_code
        FROM airports
        WHERE iata_code IS NOT NULL"""
df_airports_all = pl.read_database(query, conn)
df_airports = df_airports_all.select(pl.col("name"), pl.col("latitude_deg"), pl.col("longitude_deg"), pl.col("iata_code"))
# tromso_airport = df_airports_all.filter(pl.col("iata_code") == "TOS").select(pl.col("name").first())
# print(tromso_airport)
# AIRPORT'S CODES
# query = " select icao_code, iata_code, iso_country from airports where icao_code is not null"
df_airports_code = df_airports_all.select(pl.col("icao_code"), pl.col("iata_code"), pl.col("iso_country"), pl.col("name"))
```
```{python}
# SSB AIRPORT MONTHLY TRAFFIC + IATA CODE + ISO COUNTRY 
# DROP ROWS WITH NOTOODEN AIRPORT BECAUSE THEY ARE NOT IN AVINOR DATASET
# NOTOODEN AIRPORT HAS NOT ANY TRAFFIC FOR NAOW AT ALL
query = "SELECT * from ssb_airport_monthly_traffic "
df_airport_monthly_traffic = pl.read_database(query, conn)
df_airport_monthly_traffic =(df_airport_monthly_traffic.filter(
    pl.col("airport_icao_code") != "ENNO"
).join(
    df_airports_code,
    left_on="airport_icao_code", 
    right_on="icao_code"
))
```
```{python}
# AVINOR FLIGHTS + ISO_COUNTRY + AIRPORTS CODES
query = """SELECT  date_time_of_departure, departure_airport_iata, 
 date_time_of_arrival,arrival_airport_iata,
  aircraft_type, seats from avinor_flights"""
df_avinor_all = pl.read_database(query, conn)
```
```{python}
# CONSTANTS FOR AVINOR
START_DATE_AVINOR = date(2026, 1, 1)
END_DATE_AVINOR = date(2026, 9, 30)
LAST_MONTH_AVINOR = END_DATE_AVINOR.replace(day=1)

#CONSTANTS FOR SSB
START_DATE_SSB = date(2020, 1, 1)
END_DATE_SSB = (
    df_airport_monthly_traffic
    .select(pl.col("date").max())
    .item()
)
LAST_YEAR_SSB = END_DATE_SSB  - relativedelta(years=1)
```
```{python}
# PREPARE AVINOR DATA FOR KEPLER GL 
# WE TACE LON_DEG LAT_DEG FROM AIRPORTS DATASET AND 
# JOIN WITH AVINOR DATASET TO GET THE LOCATIONS OF DEPARTURE AND ARRIVAL AIRPORTS
df_avinor_kepler = df_avinor_all.select(pl.col("date_time_of_departure").dt.date().alias("dep_date"),
 pl.col("departure_airport_iata"), pl.col("date_time_of_arrival").dt.date().alias("arr_date"), pl.col("arrival_airport_iata" ))

df_dep = df_airports.rename({
    "latitude_deg": "dep_lat",
    "longitude_deg": "dep_lon",
    "name":"dep_name"
})

df_arr = df_airports.rename({
    "latitude_deg": "arr_lat",
    "longitude_deg": "arr_lon",
    "name":"arr_name"
})
df_avinor_kepler = (
    df_avinor_kepler
    .join(df_dep, left_on="departure_airport_iata", right_on="iata_code")
    .join(df_arr, left_on="arrival_airport_iata", right_on="iata_code")
)
df_avinor_kepler = df_avinor_kepler.rename({
    "departure_airport_iata": "dep_iata",
    "arrival_airport_iata": "arr_iata"
})
```
```{python}
# WE NEED ICAO CODE AND ISO COUNTRY TO DETERMINE IF FLIGHT IS DOMESTIC OR INTERNATIONAL
# JOIN AVINOR DATA WITH AIRPORTS CODES 
df_avinor = df_avinor_all.join(
    df_airports_code,
    left_on="departure_airport_iata",
    right_on="iata_code",
    suffix="_departure"
).join(
    df_airports_code,
    left_on="arrival_airport_iata",
    right_on="iata_code",
    suffix="_arrival"
)
```

# Flights Dashboard

## {.sidebar}
```{python}
# UI LIST OF NORWEGIAN AIRPORTS FOR SELECT INPUT
airports_list = (df_airport_monthly_traffic.filter(pl.col("iso_country")=="NO")).select("name", "iata_code").unique().sort("name")
ui.input_select("airport", "Airport:",
                choices=dict(zip(airports_list["iata_code"].to_list(), airports_list["name"].to_list())),
                selected="MQN")

```
```{python}
@reactive.calc
def airport():
    airport_code = input.airport()
    return airport_code

```

```{python}
# ADD SEAT OCCUPANCY TO SSB DATA (PASSENGERS/SEATS) AND FLIGHT TYPE (INTERNATIONAL/DOMESTIC + ARRIVAL/DEPARTURE)
df_ssb = (
    df_airport_monthly_traffic
    .filter(
        (pl.col("seats").is_not_null()) &
        (pl.col("passengers").is_not_null()) &
        (pl.col("seats") > 0) &
        (pl.col("passengers") > 0)
    )
    .with_columns(
        (pl.col("passengers") / pl.col("seats") ).alias("seat_occupancy")
    )
    .with_columns(
        ( pl.col("international_domestic") + pl.col("arrival_departure")).alias("flight_type")
    )
)
# READ AIRCRAFT SEATS BY TYPE 
query = "select * from aircraft_types_seats"
df_aircraft_seats_by_type = pl.read_database(query, conn)
df_aircraft_seats_by_type = df_aircraft_seats_by_type.select(pl.col("type"), pl.col("seats_max"))

# JOIN SEATS TO AVINOR DATA TO FILL OUT EMPTY SEATS VALUES IN AVINOR DATASET 
# SEATS IN AVINOR WAS CALCULATED FROM CONFIGURATION OF AIRCRAFT
# SOME AIRLINES HAS OWN TYPES OF CONFIGURATION THAT MAKES IMPOSSIBLE TO FIND SEATS

df_avinor = df_avinor.join(
    df_aircraft_seats_by_type,
    left_on="aircraft_type",
    right_on="type",
    how="left"
)
# COALESCE SEATS AND SEATS_RIGHT TO TOTAL_SEATS COLUMN
df_avinor = df_avinor.with_columns(
   pl.coalesce(pl.col("seats"), pl.col("seats_max")).alias("total_seats")
)

```


```{python}
# FILTER DATA FROM 2023 TO 2026
# FIND SUM OF PASSENGERS BY MONTH FOR FROM SSB DATA
# THIS IS USED IN SARIMA FORECAST MODELS 
@reactive.calc
def filtered_ssb_data():
    last3_years = END_DATE_SSB - relativedelta(years=3)
    df_Ssb = (
    df_ssb
        .filter(
            # Filter for TOS (ENTC) and valid data from 2020 to 2026
            (pl.col("date").cast(pl.Date).is_between(
               last3_years,
               END_DATE_SSB
            )) &
            (pl.col("passengers") > 10) &
            (pl.col("iata_code") == airport())
        )
        .sort("date")
        .group_by_dynamic( index_column="date", every="1mo", closed="left")
        .agg(pl.col("passengers").sum(), pl.col("seats").sum(), pl.col("flights").sum())

    )
    return df_Ssb

# FILTER DATA FROM 2020 TO 2026 AND CONVERT TO PANDAS FOR PLOTLY
@reactive.calc
def filtered_ssb_data_pd( ):
    df_Ssb = (
    df_ssb
        .filter(
            # Filter for TOS (ENTC) and valid data from 2020 to 2026
            (pl.col("date").cast(pl.Date).is_between(
               START_DATE_SSB,
               END_DATE_SSB
            )) &
            (pl.col("passengers") > 10) &
            (pl.col("iata_code") == airport())
        )
        .sort("date")
        .group_by("date")
        .agg(pl.col("passengers").sum())
    )
    df_pd = df_Ssb.to_pandas()
    return df_pd

```
```{python}
# FILTER SSB DATA FROM 2025.01.06 TO 2025.06.01 
# FIX YEAR TO ENABLE JOIN WITH AVINOR DATA (ADD 1 YEAR TO DATE)
# USED FOR FORECAST BASED ON SEATS OCCUPANCY 
@reactive.calc
def occupancy_by_type_2025():
    df_occupancy_by_type_2025 = (
        df_ssb
        .filter(
            (pl.col("date").cast(pl.Date).is_between(
                LAST_YEAR_SSB,
                END_DATE_SSB)) &
            (pl.col("iata_code") == airport()) 
        )
        .with_columns(
            # ADD 1 YEAR TO DATE TO MATCH WITH AVINOR DATA 
            pl.date( pl.col("date").dt.year() + 1 , pl.col("date").dt.month(), 1)
        )
        .rename({"date": "date_pred"})
        .select("date_pred", "flight_type", "seat_occupancy")
    )
    return df_occupancy_by_type_2025

```
```{python}
# FILTER AVINOR DATA FOR SELECTED AIRPORT AND DATES (FROM 2026.03.01 TO 2026.08.31)
@reactive.calc
def avinor_data():
    start_date = END_DATE_SSB + relativedelta(months=1)
    df_Avinor = (
        df_avinor
        .filter(
            (pl.col("date_time_of_departure").cast(pl.Date).is_between(
                start_date,
                END_DATE_AVINOR
            )) &
            (pl.col("date_time_of_arrival").cast(pl.Date).is_between(
                start_date,
                END_DATE_AVINOR
            )) &
            (
                (pl.col("departure_airport_iata") == airport()) |
                (pl.col("arrival_airport_iata") == airport())
            )
        ))
    # Add flight_type column: DD, ID, DA, IA
    df_Avinor = df_Avinor.with_columns(
        pl.when((pl.col("departure_airport_iata") == airport()) & (pl.col("iso_country_arrival") == "NO"))
        .then(pl.lit("DD"))
        .when((pl.col("departure_airport_iata") == airport()) & (pl.col("iso_country_arrival") != "NO"))
        .then(pl.lit("ID"))
        .when((pl.col("arrival_airport_iata") == airport()) & (pl.col("iso_country") == "NO"))
        .then(pl.lit("DA"))
        .when((pl.col("arrival_airport_iata") == airport()) & (pl.col("iso_country") != "NO"))
        .then(pl.lit("IA"))
        .otherwise(pl.lit(None))
        .alias("flight_type")
    )
    # BRING TO A SAME DATE FORMAT (YEAR-MONTH-01) 
    # AND GROUP BY MONTH AND FLIGHT TYPE TO GET TOTAL SEATS BY MONTH AND FLIGHT TYPE
    df_Avinor = (df_Avinor.with_columns(
            pl.when(pl.col("departure_airport_iata") == airport())
            .then(pl.col("date_time_of_departure").cast(pl.Date))
            .otherwise(pl.col("date_time_of_arrival").cast(pl.Date))
            .alias("date")
        )
        .with_columns(
            pl.date(pl.col("date").dt.year(), pl.col("date").dt.month(), 1).alias("date_pred")
        )
        .group_by("date_pred", "flight_type")
        .agg(pl.col("total_seats").sum(), pl.count().alias("flights_count"))
        .sort("date_pred")
        .select("date_pred", "flights_count", "flight_type", "total_seats"))
    return df_Avinor


# JOIN AVINOR DATA WITH OCCUPANCY BY TYPE TO CALCULATE PREDICTED PASSENGERS (TOTAL_SEATS * SEAT_OCCUPANCY)
def avinor_data_pred():
    df_Avinor_pred = (
        avinor_data()
        .join(occupancy_by_type_2025(), on=["date_pred", "flight_type"], how="left")
        .with_columns(
            (pl.col("total_seats") * pl.col("seat_occupancy")).alias("pred_passengers")
        )
        .select("date_pred", "flight_type", "total_seats", "seat_occupancy", "pred_passengers")
    )
    # Sum pred_passengers by month (combine all flight types)
    df_Avinor_pd = df_Avinor_pred.to_pandas()
    df_Avinor_monthly = df_Avinor_pd.groupby('date_pred').agg({'pred_passengers': 'sum'}).reset_index()
    df_Avinor_monthly = df_Avinor_monthly[df_Avinor_monthly['pred_passengers'] > 0]

    return df_Avinor_monthly


```

```{python}
# SARIMA MODEL WITH EXOGENOUS VARIABLES (SEATS AND FLIGHTS)
@reactive.calc
def sarima_model():
    # TAKE SSB DATA FOR 2023 -2026
    df = filtered_ssb_data()  
    # PREPARE DATA FOR SARIMA MODEL (SET DATE AS INDEX AND FREQUENCY TO MONTHLY)   
    passengers_data = df.select(["date","passengers"]).to_pandas().set_index("date")
    passengers_data = passengers_data.asfreq("MS")    

    # EXOGENOUS VARIABLES FOR SARIMA MODEL (SEATS ) AND FREQUENCY TO MONTHLY
    exog_data = df.select(["date", "seats"]).to_pandas().set_index("date")
    exog_data = exog_data.sort_index().asfreq("MS")

    # result = adfuller(passengers_data)
    # if result[1] > 0.05:
    #     d_param = 1
    # else:
    #     d_param = 0
    # FILL MISSING VALUES AFTER .ASFREQ(MS) WITH INTERPOLATION (IF ANY)
    passengers_data = passengers_data.interpolate()
    exog_data = exog_data.interpolate()

    # USE AUTO_NODEL TO FIND BEST SARIMA PARAMETERS
    auto_model = auto_arima(
        passengers_data,
        exogenous=exog_data,
        seasonal=True,
        m=12,
        d=None,  
        D=None,
        max_p=3,
        max_q=3,
        max_P=2,
        max_Q=2,
        trace=True,
        stepwise=True,
        error_action="ignore",
        suppress_warnings=True
    )

    best_order = auto_model.order
    best_seasonal = auto_model.seasonal_order

    # USE FOUND PARAMETERS IN SARIMAX
    model = SARIMAX(
        passengers_data,
        exog=exog_data,
        order=best_order,
        seasonal_order=best_seasonal,

    )
    return model.fit(disp=False)
    
```

```{python}
# MAKE SARIMA FORECAST AND PREPARE DATA FOR PLOTLY
import traceback
@reactive.calc
def sarima_forecast_data():
    try:
        model_result = sarima_model()
        # TAKE EXOGENOUS VARIABLES FOR FORECAST PERIOD FROM AVINOR DATASET (SEATS AND FLIGHTS BY MONTH)
        future_values = (avinor_data().group_by("date_pred")
        .agg(pl.col("total_seats").sum().alias("seats"), pl.col("flights_count").sum().alias("flights")).rename({
            "date_pred": "date"
        }))
        # PREPARE EXOGENOUS VARIABLES FOR FORECAST (SET DATE AS INDEX AND FREQUENCY TO MONTHLY)
        exog_future = future_values.select(["date", "seats"]).to_pandas().set_index("date")
        exog_future = exog_future.sort_index().asfreq("MS")

        if model_result is None:
            raise ValueError("Model is None")

        # FIND STEPS
        diff = relativedelta(END_DATE_AVINOR, END_DATE_SSB)
        Steps = diff.years * 12 + diff.months
        print("Steps:", Steps)

        # MAKE FORECAST
        forecast = model_result.get_forecast(steps=Steps, exog=exog_future)
        forecast_df = forecast.summary_frame()

        # CREATE DATES FOR FORECAST PERIOD
        start_date = END_DATE_SSB + relativedelta(months=1)
        forecast_dates = pd.date_range(
            start= start_date,
            periods=Steps,
            freq="MS"
        )

        forecast_df = forecast_df.copy()
        forecast_df["date"] = forecast_dates
        return forecast_df

    except Exception as e:
        import traceback
        print(traceback.format_exc()) 
        print(traceback.format_exc())
        raise
```



## Column {width=100%}
### Row {height=15%}
```{python}
# FILTER + TIME + AIRPORT
# USED IN CARD AND PLOTS WITH DOMESTIC/INTERNATIONAL AND ARRIVAL/DEPARTURE 
@reactive.calc
def ssb_for_last_year():
    df_ssb_given_date_airport = (
        df_ssb
        .filter(
            (pl.col("date").cast(pl.Date).is_between(
                LAST_YEAR_SSB,
                END_DATE_SSB
            )) &
            (pl.col("iata_code") == airport())
        )
        .with_columns([
            pl.col("date").dt.year().alias("year"),
            pl.col("date").dt.month().alias("month"),
        ])
    )
    return df_ssb_given_date_airport
    
```

::: {.columns style="gap:0px;"}
#### Column{width=20%}
```{python}
from IPython.display import Image, display
display(Image("departure.png"))
```
#### Column{width=80%}
```{python}
ui.markdown(f"**Domestic Departure for {LAST_YEAR_SSB.year}**")
@render.data_frame
def dd():
    return make_widget("DD")
```
:::
```{python}

```


::: {.columns style="gap:0px;"}
#### Column{width=20%}
```{python}
display(Image("arrival.png"))
```
#### Column{width=80%}
```{python}
ui.markdown(f"**Domestic Arrival for {LAST_YEAR_SSB.year}**")
@render.data_frame
def da():
    return make_widget("DA")
```
:::



::: {.columns style="gap:0px;"}
#### Column{width=20%}
```{python}
display(Image("departure.png"))
```
#### Column{width=80%}
```{python}
ui.markdown(f"**International Departure for {LAST_YEAR_SSB.year}**")
@render.data_frame
def id():
    return make_widget("ID")
```
:::




::: {.columns style="gap:0px;"}
#### Column{width=20%}
```{python}
display(Image("arrival.png"))
```
#### Column{width=80%}
```{python}
ui.markdown(f"**International Arrival for {LAST_YEAR_SSB.year}**")
@render.data_frame
def ia():
    return make_widget("IA")
```
:::


```{python}
def make_widget(flight_type):

    df_DD = ssb_for_last_year().filter(
        pl.col("flight_type") == flight_type
    )

    return pl.DataFrame({
        "Passengers": [df_DD["passengers"].sum()],
        "Flights":    [df_DD["flights"].sum()],
        "Seats":      [df_DD["seats"].sum()]
    })
```
### Row{height=85%}
#### Column {width=50%}
##### Row {height=50%}
```{python}
# POLT WITH FORECAST AND HISTORICAL DATA
@render_plotly
def my_plot():


    fig = go.Figure()
    
    # historical
    ssb = filtered_ssb_data_pd()
    fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
        x=ssb["date"],
        y=ssb["passengers"],
        mode='lines',
        name='Historical passengers (SSB)',
        line=dict(color='#1f77b4', width=2),
        showlegend=False
    ))
    
    # forecast
    avinor = avinor_data_pred()
    fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
        x=avinor["date_pred"],
        y=avinor["pred_passengers"],
        mode='lines',
        name='Forecast passengers',
        line=dict(color='#ff7f0e', width=2),
        showlegend=False
    ))
    
    # SARIMA forecast (green dashed line)
    sarima_df = sarima_forecast_data()
    if not sarima_df.empty:
        fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
            x=sarima_df["date"],
            y=sarima_df["mean"],
            mode='lines',
            name='SARIMA forecast',
            line=dict(color='#2ca02c', width=2),
            showlegend=False
        ))

    # CONNECTION LINES

    last_ssb = ssb.iloc[-1]
    first_avinor = avinor.iloc[0]
    if not sarima_df.empty:
        first_sarima = sarima_df.iloc[0]   
        fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
            x=[last_ssb["date"], first_sarima["date"]],
            y=[last_ssb["passengers"], first_sarima["mean"]],
            mode="lines",
            line=dict(
                color="#2ca02c",
                width=2,
                dash="dash"   
            ),
            showlegend=False
        ))
    fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
        x=[last_ssb["date"], first_avinor["date_pred"]],
        y=[last_ssb["passengers"], first_avinor["pred_passengers"]],
        mode="lines",
        line=dict(
            color='#ff7f0e',
            width=2,
            dash="dash"   
        ),
        showlegend=False
    ))
    # Add vertical line for today (2026-01-01)
    fig.add_vline(
        x=END_DATE_SSB,
        line_dash='dash',
        line_color='red',
        line_width=2
    )
    
    # Add annotation for the line
    fig.add_annotation(
        x="2026-01-01",
        text=f"Today {END_DATE_SSB}",
        showarrow=False,
        xanchor="right",
        yanchor="top"
    )
    
    # Legend 1: Historical data (top-left)
    fig.add_annotation(
        x=0.02,
        y=0.98,
        xref="paper",
        yref="paper",
        text="<b>Historical Data</b><br><span style='color:#1f77b4'>━ Historical passengers (SSB)</span>",
        showarrow=False,
        xanchor="left",
        yanchor="top",
        bgcolor='rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8)',
        bordercolor='gray',
        borderwidth=1,
        borderpad=10,
        font=dict(size=10)
    )
    
    # Legend 2: Forecast data (top-right)
    fig.add_annotation(
        x=0.98,
        y=0.98,
        xref="paper",
        yref="paper",
        text="<b>Forecast</b><br><span style='color:#ff7f0e'>━ Forecast passengers</span><br><span style='color:#2ca02c'>╌ SARIMA forecast</span>",
        showarrow=False,
        xanchor="right",
        yanchor="top",
        bgcolor='rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8)',
        bordercolor='gray',
        borderwidth=1,
        borderpad=10,
        font=dict(size=10)
    )
    
    fig.update_layout(
        autosize=True,
        title='Passengers: Historical vs Forecast',
        xaxis_title='Date',
        yaxis_title='Passengers',
        hovermode='x unified',
        template="plotly_white",
        height=500,
        xaxis=dict(
            range=['2020-01-01', '2027-12-31']
        )
    )
    
    return fig
```


##### Row {height=50%}
###### Column {width=50%"}

```{python}
# PLOT WITH ANNUAL GRAPH LINE OF FLIGHTS FOR (2023, 2024, 2025) 
# TO SEE SEASONALITY AND COMPARE YEARS
@render_plotly
def render_flights_years():
    year_2023 = (END_DATE_SSB-relativedelta(years=3)).replace(month=1, day=1)
    year_2025 = (END_DATE_SSB -relativedelta(years=1)).replace(month=12, day=31)
    df_plot = (
    df_ssb.filter((pl.col("date").cast(pl.Date).is_between(
                year_2023,
                year_2025
            )) & 
            (pl.col("iata_code") == airport()))
    .with_columns([
        pl.col("date").dt.year().alias("year"),
        pl.col("date").dt.month().alias("month"),
    ])
    .group_by(["year", "month"])
    .agg(
        pl.col("flights").sum().alias("flights_total")
    )
    .sort(["year", "month"])
    )
    month_map = {i: calendar.month_abbr[i].lower() for i in range(1, 13)}
    df_plot = df_plot.with_columns(
        pl.col("month").replace_strict(month_map).alias("month_name")
    )

    df_pd = df_plot.to_pandas()

    fig = px.line(
        df_pd,
        x="month_name",
        y="flights_total",
        color="year",  
        markers=True,
        category_orders={
            "month_name": ["jan","feb","mar","apr","may","jun",
                        "jul","aug","sep","oct","nov","dec"],
            "year": [2023, 2024, 2025]
        },
        title="Total monthly flights by year"
    )

    fig.update_layout(
        autosize=True,
        xaxis_title="Month",
        yaxis_title="Flights",
        legend_title="Year",
        paper_bgcolor="white",
        template="plotly_white"
    )

    return fig
```


###### Column {width=50%"}
```{python}
@render_plotly
def plot_domestic_internatinal():



    # AGGREGATION

    df_plot = (
        ssb_for_last_year()
        .group_by(["year", "month", "international_domestic"])
        .agg(
            pl.col("flights").sum().alias("flights_total")
        )
        .sort(["year", "month"])
    )


    #  MONTH LABELS

    month_map = {i: calendar.month_abbr[i].lower() for i in range(1, 13)}

    df_plot = df_plot.with_columns(
        pl.col("month").replace_strict(month_map).alias("month_name")
    )



    df_pd = df_plot.to_pandas()

    #  PLOTLY

    fig = px.area(
        df_pd,
        x="month_name",
        y="flights_total",
        color="international_domestic",
        facet_col="year",
        markers=True,
        category_orders={
            "month_name": [
                "jan","feb","mar","apr","may","jun",
                "jul","aug","sep","oct","nov","dec"
            ]
        },
        title="Domestic vs International Flights by Month and Year"
    )

    fig.update_layout(
        autosize=True,
        xaxis_title="Month",
        yaxis_title="Flights",
        legend_title="Type",
        paper_bgcolor="white",
        template="plotly_white"
    )

    return fig

```
#### Column {width=50%}
##### Row {height=50%}
###### Column{width=50%"}

::: {.rows style="gap:0px;"}
####### Row {height=25%, gap=0px}
```{python}
ui.input_slider(
    "slider",
    label=f"Select a month for {START_DATE_AVINOR.year}:",
    min=START_DATE_AVINOR.month,
    max=END_DATE_AVINOR.month,
    value=START_DATE_AVINOR.month,
    step=1,
    width="100%"
)
```
####### Row {height=75%, gap=0px}
```{python}

@render_plotly
def plot_weekly_traffic():
    df_weekly = (
    df_avinor
    .filter(
        ((pl.col("departure_airport_iata") == airport()) |
        (pl.col("arrival_airport_iata") == airport())) &
        (pl.col("date_time_of_departure").dt.date().is_between(
            pl.date(START_DATE_AVINOR.year, input.slider(), 1),
           pl.date(START_DATE_AVINOR.year, input.slider(), calendar.monthrange(START_DATE_AVINOR.year, input.slider())[1])
        ))
    )
    .with_columns(
        pl.col("date_time_of_departure").dt.date().alias("date")
    )
    .group_by("date")
    .agg(
        pl.count().alias("daily_flights")
    )
    .with_columns(
        pl.col("date").dt.strftime("%A").alias("weekday_name"),
        pl.col("date").dt.weekday().alias("weekday")
    )
    .group_by(["weekday_name", "weekday"])
    .agg(
        pl.col("daily_flights").mean().round(0).alias("avg_flights")
    )
    .sort("weekday"))

    # df_weekly.write_csv("weekly.txt")
    
   
    pdf = df_weekly.to_pandas()


    fig = px.bar(
        pdf,
        x="weekday_name",
        y="avg_flights",
        title=f"Average Flights per Weekday for {date(START_DATE_AVINOR.year, input.slider(), 1).strftime('%B %Y')}",
        labels={
            "weekday_name": "Day of Week",
            "avg_flights": "Average Flights"
        }
    )
    fig.update_layout(
        xaxis_title="Week day",
        yaxis_title="Flights",
        legend_title="Type",
        paper_bgcolor="white",
        autosize=True,
        template="plotly_white"
    )

    return fig


```
:::
###### Column{width=50%"}
```{python}
@render_plotly
def plot_hourly_traffic():
    df_hourly = (
        df_avinor
        .filter(
           ( (pl.col("departure_airport_iata") == airport()) |
            (pl.col("arrival_airport_iata") == airport()) ) &
            (pl.col("date_time_of_departure").dt.date().is_between(
                pl.date(START_DATE_AVINOR.year, input.slider(), 1),
                pl.date(START_DATE_AVINOR.year, input.slider(), calendar.monthrange(START_DATE_AVINOR.year, input.slider())[1])
            ))
        )
        .with_columns([
            pl.col("date_time_of_departure").dt.date().alias("date"),
            pl.col("date_time_of_departure").dt.hour().alias("hour")
        ])
        
        .group_by(["date", "hour"])
        .agg(
            pl.count().alias("hourly_flights")
        )
        
        .group_by("hour")
        .agg(
            pl.col("hourly_flights").mean().alias("avg_flights")
        )
        .sort("hour")
    )

    pdf = df_hourly.to_pandas()

    fig = px.bar(
        pdf,
        x="hour",
        y="avg_flights",
        title=f"Average Flights per Hour of Day for {date(START_DATE_AVINOR.year, input.slider(), 1).strftime('%B %Y')}",
        labels={
            "hour": "Hour of Day",
            "avg_flights": "Average Flights"
        }
    )
    fig.update_layout(
        autosize=True,
        xaxis_title="Hour of Day",
        yaxis_title="Flights",
        legend_title="Type",
        template="plotly_white",
        paper_bgcolor="white"
    )
    fig.update_xaxes(
        dtick=1
    )
    return fig

```
##### Row{height=50%}
###### Column {width=50%}

```{python}
@render_plotly
def plot_arival_departure_growth():


    df = (
        ssb_for_last_year()
        .with_columns([
            pl.col("date").dt.year().alias("year"),
            pl.col("date").dt.month().alias("month"),
        ])
        .group_by(["year", "month", "arrival_departure"])
        .agg(
            pl.col("passengers").sum().alias("passengers_total")
        )
        .pivot(
            values="passengers_total",
            index=["year", "month"],
            columns="arrival_departure"
        )
        .fill_null(0)
        .with_columns(
            (pl.col("A") - pl.col("D")).alias("diff")
        )
        .sort(["year", "month"])
    )


    month_map = {i: calendar.month_abbr[i].lower() for i in range(1, 13)}

    df = df.with_columns(
        pl.col("month").replace_strict(month_map).alias("month_name")
    )

    df_pd = df.to_pandas()

    fig = px.line(
        df_pd,
        x="month_name",
        y="diff",
        color="year",
        markers=True,
        category_orders={
            "month_name": [
                "jan","feb","mar","apr","may","jun",
                "jul","aug","sep","oct","nov","dec"
            ]
        },
        title="Arrival - Departure Passenger Difference"
    )
    fig.add_hline(
    y=0,
    line_dash="dash",
    line_color="red",
    line_width=2
    )
    fig.update_layout(
        autosize=True,
        xaxis_title="Month",
        yaxis_title="Passengers (Arrival - Departure)",
        template="plotly_white"
    )

    return fig
```
###### Column {width=50%}
```{python}
@render_widget
def plot_flights_ipyleaflet():

    routes = (
    df_avinor_kepler
    .filter(pl.col("dep_iata") == airport())
    .filter(
        pl.col("dep_date").is_between(LAST_MONTH_AVINOR, END_DATE_AVINOR)
    )
    .group_by("arr_iata")
    .agg(
        pl.len().alias("flight_count"),
        pl.first("arr_lat"),
        pl.first("arr_lon")
    )
    )
    dep = (
    df_avinor_kepler
    .filter(pl.col("dep_iata") == airport())
    .select(["dep_lat", "dep_lon"])
    .drop_nulls()
    .head(1)
    .to_pandas()
    )
    dep_lat, dep_lon = dep.iloc[0]

    m = Map(center=(dep_lat, dep_lon), zoom=4)

    # m.add(Marker(location=( df["latitude_deg"][0], df["longitude_deg"][0] )))
    df = routes.to_pandas()
    df["flight_class"] = pd.qcut(
        df["flight_count"],
        q=5,
        labels=False,
        duplicates="drop"
    )

    df["flight_class"] = df["flight_class"].fillna(0).astype(int)

    opacity_map = {
        0: 0.3,
        1: 0.45,
        2: 0.55,
        3: 0.7,
        4: 1.0
    }

    weight_map = {
        0: 1,
        1: 1,
        2: 2,
        3: 2,
        4: 2
    }

    for _, row in df.iterrows():

        if pd.isna(row["arr_lat"]) or pd.isna(row["arr_lon"]):
            continue

        line = Polyline(
            locations=[
                (dep_lat, dep_lon),
                (row["arr_lat"], row["arr_lon"])
            ],
            color="blue",
            weight=weight_map[row["flight_class"]],
            opacity=opacity_map[row["flight_class"]],
            lineCap='round'
        )

        m.add(line)

    m.add(CircleMarker(
        location=(dep_lat, dep_lon),
        radius=6,
        color="red"
    ))

    return m
``` 





# Map
```{python}
from keplergl import KeplerGl
@render_widget
def display_map():
    
    map_1 = KeplerGl(
        height="100%",
        data={"Intra flights": df_avinor_kepler.to_pandas().dropna()},
        config=map_config
    )
    # map_1.add_data(data=df_avinor.to_pandas().dropna(), name="flights")

    return map_1
```

# Pivot SSB
## Row {height=100%}
```{python}
@render.ui

def display_ssb_traffic():

    html_code =pyg.to_html(df_ssb,  appearance="light")
    return ui.div(
        ui.HTML(html_code),
        style="height: 100%; margin: 0; padding: 0;"
    )
``` 

# Pivot AVINOR
## Row {height=100%}
```{python}

@render.ui

def display_avinor():

    html_code =pyg.to_html(df_avinor,  appearance="light")
    return ui.div(
        ui.HTML(html_code),
        style="height: 100%; margin: 0; padding: 0;"
    )
```
